headline: Bitcoin Targets $63K Amid Chip Stock 10% Plunge

article.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
article.summary: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

headline: Bitcoin SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT Upgrade Sparks 10% Price Surge

article.title: Bitcoin Covenants Part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
article.summary: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.

headline: Nasdaq 100 Plunges 2% on Chip Sector Sell-Off

article.title: Nasdaq 100 Falls 2% in Chip-Led Rout as Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down the stock market on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations after a breakneck surge from war-driven lows.

headline: Hedge Funds Surge 10% in H1 Gains

article.title: Why Hedge Funds Posted Such a Strong First Half
article.summary: Hedge funds posted a strong first half with Lone Pine Capital posting a 43% gain and David Tepper’s Appaloosa Management returning 32%. Sridhar Natarajan has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
